name: Commercial Freight Invoice Evidence
description: Commercial shipments require invoice number, freight description, cargo value, carrier name, and vehicle or trailer identifier.

name: Commercial Cargo Safety Attestation
description: Commercial cargo records must include weight declaration, bill of lading reference, and hazardous material attestation when applicable.

name: Passenger Fleet Transport Evidence
description: Passenger fleet invoices require passenger route, vehicle identifier, service date, operator name, and fare or service charge evidence.

name: General Shipping Identity Check
description: All inspections require supplier name, invoice copy, vehicle identification, and shipment date.
